success_criterion: Object lifted ≥ 1 cm from its start height.
example_resolved_instructions: Pick up the green glossy cup with spherical base | Pick up the cylindrical blue lighter with red button | Pick up the white bowl

instruction_template: Pick up the {pickup_name} and place it in or on the {place_name}
success_criterion: ≥50% of object weight vertically supported by the receptacle; receptacle not displaced >10 cm or 45°.
example_resolved_instructions: Pick up the spray and place it in or on the bowl | Pick up the apple and place it in or on the plate

instruction_template: Pick up the {pickup_name} and place it next to the {place_name}
success_criterion: Object within 5 cm surface-to-surface of the receptacle on the same support; receptacle not moved >5 cm or 45°.
example_resolved_instructions: Pick up the fork and place it next to the plate | Pick up the mug and place it next to the kettle

instruction_template: Pick up the {pickup_name} and place it in or on the {color} {place_name}
success_criterion: Same as pick-and-place, but the correct receptacle is selected among multiple color-differentiated ones (color named in the prompt).
example_resolved_instructions: Pick up the block and place it in or on the red bowl | Pick up the sponge and place it in or on the blue tray

instruction_template: Pick up the {pickup_name} and place it into the {place_name}
success_criterion: Object placed INTO a container (containment, not just support).
example_resolved_instructions: Pick up the toy and place it into the box | Pick up the marker and place it into the cup

success_criterion: Open: articulated fixture (drawer, cabinet, microwave, fridge) from fully-closed opened ≥15%. Close: from half-open closed to ≤15% open.
example_resolved_instructions: Open the oven | Open the drawer | Close the drawer | Open the microwave

success_criterion: Hinged door opened ≥67% by manipulating its handle or surface.
Hinged door opened ≥67% by manipulating its handle or surface.
Target initialized 4–20 m away; success = target visible from head camera AND within 1.5 m.
example_resolved_instructions: Navigate to the refrigerator | Navigate to the sofa

success_criterion: Multiple valid targets exist; reaching any one within 1.5 m and in view succeeds.
example_resolved_instructions: Navigate to any chair (4 available) | Navigate to any potted plant (3 available)
